description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of wood and white panel finishes. The front consists of two tall, flat doors with subtle vertical recessed handles, providing a sleek and unobtrusive look. The sides and top are finished in a darker wood grain, while the back and one side panel display a lighter wood tone. The rear view reveals open shelving with several books, indicating integrated storage space accessible from the back. The overall structure is tall and rectangular, with clean lines and a sturdy build. The wardrobe is likely constructed from engineered wood or laminate, offering both durability and aesthetic appeal.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with white front doors, wood grain sides, and open shelving on the back. Features recessed handles and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two white doors with vertical recessed handles and a partial wood side panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full height and depth, finished in dark wood grain with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a combination of dark and light wood panels, with no visible doors or shelves.
description_view_3: Back view revealing open shelving filled with books, finished in light wood grain.
